arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy's gap-year tour, experiment over - nine revelations from Leicester City boss - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy gave a playful answer to the inevitable question over Jamie Vardy beating his Premier League goalscoring streak nine years ago, but otherwise it was all serious. Both on Friday when he was announced as manager and at his press conference, van Nistelrooy gave plenty of shout-outs to Maresca, perhaps knowing that a mention of his name will go down well with the squad and spark good memories with supporters.

arts.sum: The former Manchester United striker was asked about all manner of subjects, from his time as interim boss at Old Trafford, all the way back to a message he sent Jamie Vardy nine years ago. To be managing this club and this group of players and representing Leicester City in the Premier League.
